title: Afrosolen setifolius
taxonomy: Afrosolen setifolius belongs to the family Amaryllidaceae and is further classified as being part of the genus Afrosolen. This classification makes it a part of the larger monocot family. Within the Amaryllidaceae family, Afrosolen setifolius is closely related to other bulbous plants that share similar characteristics. The exact classification of Afrosolen setifolius may be subject to change as new research emerges. Further research is necessary to fully understand its classification within the plant kingdom.
